title: Converting T-SQL code to PL/pgSQL with confidence
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates using Gemini to convert T-SQL procedures to PL/pgSQL for cloud database migration. Gemini provides code translation and educational explanations to help developers build PostgreSQL expertise during schema migration workflows.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video demonstrates using Gemini to convert T-SQL stored procedures to PL/pgSQL as part of a cloud database migration to PostgreSQL. Beyond producing translated code, Gemini supplies explanations of the conversions, helping developers build PostgreSQL expertise during schema migration workflows. The takeaway: an LLM handles both the mechanical translation between SQL dialects and the teaching that accompanies it.
